description: A photograph displaying a detailed view of the Glacier de Bossons, illustrating the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) Land Cover / Land Use (LCLU) class 6.3.3.0 "Glaciers and Perpetual Snow." The image captures a rugged mountain landscape with prominent snow-covered peaks, a large glacier descending a steep slope, and dense dark green forest vegetation covering the lower mountain flanks. The sky is partly cloudy with significant patches of blue. The credit for the photo is M. Rodriguez.
